feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2099 201 1898 98
US 1948 176 1772 80

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: GenChord - Guitar Scale Chord
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$3.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

GenChord Guitar is a chord and music theory tool built around the guitar fretboard. It does more than show where to place your fingers. It connects chords, scales, fingering shapes, diatonic harmony, and tensions on the same fretboard, so you can understand why each voicing works. Use the Library to search chords by root, type, and tension, including triads, seventh chords, sixth chords, sus, aug, dim, half-dim, b5, #5, bb7, and 9/11/13 tensions. Open Chord Explain to see the same chord across the Mi, Sol, La, Si, and Re shapes, which correspond to the CAGED system. Generate I-VII diatonic chords from major, minor, harmonic minor, melodic minor, and church modes. Start from any string and fret in the Fingering Tool to build a scale shape and the chords inside it. Play voicings as strums, arpeggios, or randomized notes, then save useful chords into Collections with iCloud Drive or local storage. GenChord Guitar is a fretboard-first way to study harmony, guitar voicings, accompaniment, arranging, and improvisation.

entry.title: GenChord - Piano Scale Chord
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$5.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $5.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

This time, you can learn chords and scales visually. Explore the structure of chords by moving different chord tones. You’ll gain a thorough understanding of the origins of chord names. This app can generate every chord structure you can imagine, making it easy to look up and memorize them. The process of understanding music should be clear and simple. GenChord helps you uncover the core principles behind music. More features are continuously being updated. · Library – Quick Chord Lookup Generate every possible chord from a music theory perspective—no need to wonder if the list is complete. Tap to play the chord, long press to arpeggiate, swipe right for details. · Query - Chord Reverse Finder. Reverse lookup for basic chords / omit chords / inverted chords / chords with all added tensions. In the playground, Bluetooth connection and MIDI cable connection are also supported. Now you can enjoy features that were previously available only to PC users. · Create – Your Own Chords collect and curate chord progressions. Enjoy more control features, add memory curves, and include numbered notation. Rearrange and combine freely—one chord can evolve into endless variations. Your pop/jazz assistant—you deserve it. · Playground – Music Sandbox For teaching, training, and testing—your free space to play music and your Swiss Army knife for creation. Highly recommended: the Diatonic Chords feature to explore beautiful progressions. Tap anytime, anywhere to trigger inspiring notes.

entry.title: Tokyo Train!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → $0.49 [$0.29 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.49

Application Description

Run Japan's trains! No railroad knowledge is required to play "Tokyo Train!". This game is a brain game with simple rules but requires a lot of brain power. Customers are waiting at the station for the trains to arrive to take them to their destinations. Start the trains and transport your customers. You will earn money for every passenger who boards a train. Adjust the interval between runs and the number of cars to achieve the highest revenue. Departing trains costs money. If you send out too many trains and the boarding rate drops, you will lose your revenue. The operation method is very easy and the rules are simple. All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time. As the game progresses, express fares will also appear. No technical knowledge is required at all. Both people who like trains and people who like games can quickly understand and enjoy the game. There are no in-app purchases. There are no ads. Please concentrate on the game. Share your operating results on social media.

entry.title: Deflection
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$6.99 → $0.99 [Free ~ $14.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Deflection is a powerful, versatile calculator for beams, 2D trusses, and 2D frames. The interface is simple and intuitive, and the graphical output is state-of-the-art. In addition to reaction, shear, bending moment, and deflection results, Deflection also computes internal shear and bending stress along the cross section and along the beam. 2D FRAME AND TRUSS EDITOR The 2D editor is seamlessly integrated with the beam editor. Draw arbitrary frame and truss structures and apply loads and constraints using the same simple interface as for beams. You can visualize results directly within the 2D editor, or you can select a beam and get additional insights. INTERNAL STRESSES Obtain internal bending and shear stress diagrams in addition to shear, bending, and deflection diagrams. The internal stresses can be visualized along the length of the beam as well as along the vertical axis of the cross section using the beam editor. CROSS SECTION EDITOR Edit built-in cross sections. Moment of inertia and area values are automatically calculated and applied to the rest of the beam calculations. MORE FEATURES • The built-in database contains more data for your reference and convenience. • Apply beam self-weight optionally • Unlimited design files • Quick-start templates CONTACT We like to hear from you! Please email contact@ketchep.com if you have any issues, questions, or comments.

entry.title: Road to Empress
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Road to Empress II：$13.90 → $12.90 [$12.90 ~ $13.90]

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

In-App Purchases

  • Road to Empress Collection：$17.49
  • Road to Empress I：$6.79
  • Road to Empress II：$12.90
  • 600 Flowers：$0.99
  • 6000 Gold Flower：$0.99
  • 30000 Gold Flower：$4.99
  • 3,000 Flowers：$4.99

Application Description

This drama requires an internet connection. Road to Empress I contains 16 chapters; Road to Empress II contains 32 chapters. Both include free trial chapters. A palace adventure unlike anything you've played—shaped entirely by your choices! Road to Empress II is now available! Step into a world of Eastern palace intrigue and power. ● Building on Road to Empress I, The Palace Legend Continues Road to Empress I has captivated audiences globally. Now, Road to Empress II plunges you into a gripping battle of court politics. Watch a legendary empress rise to new glory! ● 4K Cinematic Quality, Eastern Palace Aesthetics Reimagined Filmed on lavishly built sets with 4K cinematic lighting, the story brings Eastern palaces to life: silk brocade texture, glinting golden hairpins, and a stirring traditional score. Featuring actors Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo Yao, and Hana Lin. Sweeping scenes and nuanced performances ensure this golden age unfold right before your eyes. This is the ultimate Eastern aesthetic feast! ● From Unknown Girl to Legendary Empress, Write Your Own Story! Ready to defy fate? Dive into the most thrilling palace power struggles ever! Rise from an unknown girl, break through rival factions, and climb to the peak of power. Think like a ruler: balance court power, plan ahead, and carve a blazing path to the throne. ● Approx.1,500 Minutes, Fully Immersed in Ruling Empress's Life With around 1,500 minutes (I & II) of live-action content, immerse yourself in a sweeping saga of ambition and survival. Every choice triggers a chain of consequences. Twists and suspense await as you seize control and rewrite a dynasty's fate! You decide who rises in the global popularity rankings. ● Stop Being a Spectator, Start Ruling Your Realm A fully upgraded interactive experience: power is a battle of wits at your fingertips: Review Memorials: Work through memorials, balance noble houses, and shape the empire with one stroke of your brush. Issue Edicts: Weigh every decision and define the court's fate. Rule with an iron fist or a merciful hand, and build the empire you envision! ● What Kind of Ruler Are You? Exclusive Trait Sketch Unlocked At story's end, unlock an exclusive imperial trait sketch covering your scheming style, crisis decision-making, and methods of control. Are you the "Deadly Arsenic Trioxide"—cool, versatile, balancing power and passion? The "Romantic Datura"—loyal, ride-or-die, charging headfirst through fire? Or the "Overachiever Lurid Bolete"—ruthless, letting nothing stand in the way of ambition? Discover who you really are and share your exclusive empress profile! About New One Studio An independent team focused on interactive storytelling, blending Eastern culture with interactive media. In 2019, our users championed The Invisible Guardian and earned us a BAFTA, proving great interactive storytelling can live in people's hearts. Road to Empress depicts the deadly beauty of Eastern intrigue — a battlefield that tests your wisdom and courage. Two works, different stories, one shared vision: let global users experience traditional Eastern culture. A bridge across cultures for every FMV fan. Road to Empress is a saga of the legendary empress. In Road to Empress I, follow a legendary beginning — an unknown girl navigating deadly palace power struggles with wisdom and courage. In Road to Empress II, return as a master strategist. Stakes are brutally higher. Pull the strings, keep ministers in check, and forge a golden age. Every word of your empire's legacy — written by you! (Official Orange Light Authorization, with sincere thanks to Orange Light for their music support.) YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/ Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

entry.title: 三國志天下布武 - 單機戰棋策略遊戲
entry.id: 三國志天下布武 - 單機戰棋策略遊戲-us-1782636678148
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • 禮包11：$99.99 → $49.99 [$49.99 ~ $99.99]

All Price Information

Price：$0.29

In-App Purchases

  • 68金玉：$9.99
  • 禮包9：$29.99
  • 648金玉：$99.99
  • 禮包7：$14.99
  • 30金玉：$4.99
  • 198金玉：$29.99
  • 禮包8：$19.99
  • 禮包11：$49.99
  • 禮包5：$4.99
  • 328金玉：$49.99

Application Description

限時活動：下載即送「超值大禮包」建功立業快人一步！ 這是我們開發的一款單機向SLG 借鑒和學習了《三國志》、《霸王的大陸》系列， 內容豐富耐玩，上手後極易沉迷， 遊戲沒有大額付費，就算不付費也可以愉快的玩幾十個小時。 但由於難度較高，強烈不建議新手上來就挑戰困難難度。 【遊戲特點】 豐富的戰鬥陣形和技能， 在戰斗場景中山河、湖泊、城關等不同地形上有變化多端的戰術組合， 加上天氣系統對戰局的影響，使得戰場玩法極具特色。 根據面對敵人的情況不同， 不同戰術可以形成各自的打法流派， 常見的如搶城速攻流、近戰突擊流，單挑控制流、遠射連珠流等等。 數十萬字原創遊戲文本，全部源自製作團隊對相關史料的分析提煉， 各種武將列傳、軼事；各地的背景介紹，皆有可靠的依據出處。 玩家玩遊戲的同時能感受到那個時代的文化氣息、社會風貌， 從更豐富的層面帶玩家領略濃厚的歷史人文精神。 【玩家攻略社区】 Facebook:三國志天下布武 Line:sanguo15 【為什麼選擇開發這款遊戲】 我從小便沉迷於《霸王的大陸》和光榮的《三國志》， 但市面上很難找到類似玩法的手機遊戲。 於是我做了一個，只是沒想到，這個歷程是如此的艱難。 我常常跟同是做這類產品的朋友浪子交流，他說《漢末霸業》一路走來，一樣殊為不易，在這個年代想要有自己的堅持，必須付出相當的代價。 經常有朋友問我，“為什麼不去做別的更賺錢的遊戲？” 的確，我們的這款遊戲不怎麼賺錢， 不充值都可以玩的很開心，充個幾十能嗨皮幾個月。 朋友的這個問題，是對我的靈魂拷問。 因為我的年紀已經不小了，拖家帶口的，這個問題必須正視。 但朋友說的“那種賺錢的遊戲”，我不喜歡。 朋友不理解我對這種遊戲的感情。 在那個網吧還只有局域網的年代， 這個品類的遊戲伴著我度過了無數個日日夜夜。 為了統一全國殫精竭慮，以至於茶飯不思、夙夜難眠。 那時的我，是沉浸的，是幸福的。 而現在，我有機會能利用我的專業技能把這種感受發揚光大。 把我自己對這種遊戲的理解傾注到產品之中， 置於更大的平台之上， 讓更多跟我同樣喜歡這類游戲的玩家體會到這種快樂， 這是一種使命，一種榮譽。 能做這個遊戲，是我人生中最幸福的事情。 我還有很多關於它的想法，已經在心頭縈繞多年， 我想要呈現的，還遠不止之前大家曾看到的。 如果能賺錢，我會把這個遊戲一直做下去。 如果賺不到，我就先去做點別的，用賺來的錢把這個遊戲繼續做下去。 逝水東流，青山依舊，是非成敗，任人評說。 我素未謀面的朋友們，祝你們玩得開心。 ——遊戲製作人：奶牛

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Apnea Trainer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$29.99 → Free [Free ~ $29.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Training Plan – Loyalty · mo.：$1.99
  • Apnea Trainer Pro – Monthly：$4.99
  • Apnea Trainer Pro – Yearly：$17.99
  • Training Plan – Loyalty · one-time：$9.99
  • Apnea Trainer Pro – Lifetime：$24.99
  • Training Plan – Loyalty · yr.：$6.99

Application Description

Ranked in the top 5 best-selling sports apps in Germany, Australia, the UK, and France. ----- Description ----- The precise breath-holding training app for freedivers, snorkelers, and anyone who wants to hold their breath longer. Imagine you’re snorkeling in the ocean on vacation and see big, colorful fish 6 meters below the surface—you’d love to dive down on a single breath and take unforgettable photos. With Apnea Trainer, that’s possible. By training three times a week, you’ll quickly double your time underwater. Your personalized training plan: Answer a few short questions about your skill level and your goal—Apnea Trainer will use this information to create a training plan spanning several weeks that’s tailored just for you. Each session is scheduled and builds on the previous one, so you’ll see measurable improvement week after week. Your progress is tracked automatically—all you have to do is train. Four training modes: • Apnea Training – Inhale, hold your breath, exhale. Optimal intervals for maximum performance improvement. • Pranayama – Four-phase breathing for relaxation and preparation right before snorkeling or freediving. • Cyclic – Cyclical breathing training in rounds with hold and recovery phases that specifically increases your CO₂ tolerance. • Custom Pro – All four phases freely adjustable from 0 to 240 seconds for competitive athletes. The smart Performance Index automatically adjusts training times to your level—you’ll improve without having to do the math yourself. Visual and audio cues (voice prompts and haptic feedback) guide you through each phase. No need to think—just train. Apple Watch: Start and control your workout right from your wrist. During the exercise, you’ll see your heart rate in real time and be guided through each phase by gentle vibrations—without having to look at your iPhone. Stopwatch & Progress: With the built-in apnea stopwatch, you can measure and save your best breath-hold attempts. Track your personal bests on weekly, monthly, or yearly charts and share special milestones with friends. Motivating Streak System: Stay on track and dive deeper and deeper. Maintain your daily workout streak, advance through deeper and deeper zones, and earn over 35 awards for consistency, volume, and personal records. If you miss a day, a “Freeze” joker will save your streak. Share your unlocked achievements and new personal bests with a single tap as a beautiful image on your social media. Privacy & Sync Without an Account: Your progress is securely synced across all your Apple devices via iCloud without requiring registration or an account. The data is stored exclusively in your private iCloud database—no tracking, no sharing, and the highest privacy standards. More than 10,000 active users confirm its success: Beginners can double their performance within 7 days by using Apnea Trainer for 3 minutes daily. Advanced athletes have reported consistent performance gains of 10 to 20 seconds within 10 days. Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/ Privacy Policy: https://apnea-trainer.com/privacy/

entry.title: 宗师-武林风云传
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 3880元宝：$59.99
  • 月卡VIP：$3.99
  • 880元宝：$12.99
  • 终身卡VIP：$59.99
  • 1680元宝：$24.99
  • 2980元宝：$39.99
  • 250元宝：$3.99
  • 60元宝：$0.99
  • 年卡VIP：$34.99
  • 终身VIP：$59.99

Application Description

一、游戏背景 昔日碌碌无为，消磨光阴。后受教于南贤智者，立志成为武林盟主，为此踏上江湖征程。 二、游戏特色 -单机、联网均可玩的RPG。 -武侠剧情，环环相扣。 -江湖友人，相伴同行。 -武林之行，可正可邪。 -江湖问道，高人指点。 -侠客排行，不再孤单。 -江湖奇遇，武学进阶。 -江湖秘境，暗藏珍宝。 -夺得神杖，无限重玩。 -侠客挂机，快速升级。 -高度自由的世界大地图，近百座情景建筑。 -数百种武功可学，绝艺不限于耍刀、御剑与拳掌。

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
